nasb.text: What will you say when He appoints over you— And you yourself had taught them— Former companions to be head over you? Will not pangs take hold of you Like a woman in childbirth?

esv.text: What will you say when they set as head over you those whom you yourself have taught to be friends to you? Will not pangs take hold of you like those of a woman in labor?

cnv.text: 耶和華立你自己結交的盟友 為首領管轄你， 那時，你還有甚麼話說呢？ 痛苦豈不把你抓住， 好像婦女生產時的痛苦一樣嗎？

ccb.text: 耶和华让你结交的盟友来统治你， 你还有什么话可说？ 难怪你痛苦不堪， 就像分娩的妇人。
